changes.reason: Activate the already-configured charm_pin_pullback_long branch as the controlled pin/pullback attribution leg inside the current valid-0DTE router rather than broadening global vetoes. The profile is profitable but owns the global -513.4 MAE tail, so this run should preserve routing visibility while testing a local regime split hypothesis.

The worst charm-pin tail entered at ES-VWAP 26.69, beyond the current dynamicMaxVwapDistance readout around 17.89, while protected extended-VWAP winners exist and should not be globally blocked. Lowering the local dynamic VWAP ceiling from 30 to 25 is a narrow charm-pin-only boundary nudge that targets the extreme tail without touching pullback_long, squeeze_long, or global extended-VWAP rejection settings.

The worst tail had pullback-from-high 9.25 and rolling-high distance 14.25 with delayed recovery; many protected extended-VWAP winners resolve fast at lower pullback/rejection levels. Raising the charm-pin recent-high rejection pullback threshold from 6 to 8 makes the local pin-pullback logic more selective around deep rejection states while avoiding a blanket ES-VWAP distance cap.

Current volatility multiplier 0.5 appears to admit high-extension charm-pin entries during weak/negative acceleration. Reducing to 0.4 tests whether the dynamic extension allowance can trim late stretched entries while retaining the clean fast extended-VWAP winners that broad hidden signatures would over-prune.

expected_effect: Expected to reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst/average MAE and exposure from delayed high-extension pin recoveries while retaining most of the 34-trade, $1261.5 profile edge. Reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_029, protected extended-VWAP winners are materially cannibalized, completed trades fall more than 10%, or pullback_long/squeeze_long throughput is affected.
label: charm-pin-local-extension-box
rationale: This uses a single profile-specific strategy-profile family, not global veto tightening or take-profit compression. run_029/run_037 are the best anchors with 107 trades, $7149.6 net profit, and no slow >=12h trades, but the current risk-adjusted bottleneck is hidden MAE from charm_pin_pullback_long. Global hidden signatures retain only about 79-84% PnL or leave worst MAE unchanged, and prior RSI-boundary surgical veto lost score without improving worst MAE. A local charm-pin dynamic-extension box is the least invasive config-only test aligned with the strategist plan: preserve pullback, squeeze, charm-wall, and 1DTE edges while probing the high-extension charm-pin tail.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1261.5 across 34 VALID_0DTE trades with median hold near 5 minutes, but owns the global -513.4 MAE. The worst entry combined ES-VWAP 26.69, negative VWAP acceleration, pullback-from-high 9.25, rolling-high distance 14.25, and first meaningful profit only after about 80 minutes. Protected extended-VWAP winners argue against a global cap.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Static config boundaries may still remove profitable delayed recoveries or fail to catch the path-dependent tail; a path-aware classifier can overfit unless validated against protected fast-winner UTCS.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to print early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of run_029, and slow_12h remains 0.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY breakout fallback produced 20 trades and $1305 PnL, while direct 1DTE quality tightening repeatedly hurt score and net profit. This suggests companion routing, not direct tightening.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Router overlap may cannibalize the profitable breakout_long_1dte baseline or the companion may be unreachable.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.86, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, and score is flat or better.

strategy_plan_reference.market_regime_read: This is a short, high-win-rate, take-profit-only regime over about 12.3 calendar days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so the objective risk is hidden MAE, cap...
